posts.author: solotony (Antonio Solo)
posts.cookedHtml:
How to link custom trigger’s output to standard actions in the Monday CRM ?

I have created a trigger

image1060×2254 238 KB

then i created a recepie

image2584×1202 102 KB

then i create an integration

image2436×1010 96.1 KB

how to link triggers output fields into new item fields ?

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
You need to output a Board from your trigger, and an Item Column Values field.

Your trigger on the “Input Fields” will need the board ID to send it to your backend when the recipe is added so that you can send it in the “outputFields” in the future. You’ll also need to set up something in the trigger recipe to get the columns you want to map your inputs to.

You also should probably edit your post and change the category to “monday Apps & Developers”, the one you posted to is for using apps and integrations, not creating them. You’ll get better answers with it in the right place.
